title: W. Haden Blackman

|nationality=

|companies=[[Sony|Sony Online Entertainment]]<ref name="SonyCite">{{SonyCite|url=team_comments_old.jsp?id=56265&page=Team%20Comments|text=Haden Blackman's Letter to the Community}}</ref>

'''William Haden Blackman'''<ref>{{Marvel|url=comics/creators/12430/william_haden_blackman|text=William Haden Blackman: Comics}}</ref> is a writer who has long worked in the ''[[Star Wars]]'' universe. He was also the project lead on the MMO ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'' and the video game ''[[Star Wars: The Force Unleashed]]''. He resigned from his position at [[LucasArts]] on July 29, 2010.<ref>{{WebCite|url=http://xbox360.ign.com/articles/110/1109349p1.html|text=Force Unleashed Producer Resigns|author=Reilly, Jim|date=2010-07-29|archivedate=20120517075248}}</ref>

{{Author-stub}}

==''Star Wars'' works==
===Books===
*''[[The New Essential Guide to Vehicles and Vessels]]'' (2003)
*''[[Star Wars Galaxies: The Ruins of Dantooine]]'' (with [[Voronica Whitney-Robinson]]) (2003)
*''[[The New Essential Guide to Weapons and Technology]]'' (2004)
*''[[The Art and Making of Star Wars: The Force Unleashed]]'' (with [[Brett Rector]])

===Comics===

*''[[Starfighter: Crossbones]]'' (2002)
*''[[Star Wars: Obsession]]'' (2005)

**[[Republic 50|''Republic'' 50]] (with [[John Ostrander]] and [[Scott Allie]]) (2003)

**"[[Fierce Currents]]" (2004)
**"[[Skywalkers]]" (2004)

*''[[Star Wars: Purge: The Hidden Blade]]'' (2010)
*[[Star Wars: The Force Unleashed II (comic)|''Star Wars: The Force Unleashed II comic'']] (2010)
*''[[Star Wars: Darth Vader and the Lost Command]]'' (2011)
*''[[Star Wars: Darth Vader and the Ghost Prison]]'' (2012)

===Video Games===
*[[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace (video game)|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''The Phantom Menace'' video game]] (Project Writer/Researcher, Manual Writer)
*''[[Star Wars: Force Commander]]'' (Script Supervisor, Additional Voice Direction, Manual Writer) (1999)
*''[[Star Wars: Demolition]]'' (Manual Writer) (2000)
*''[[Star Wars: Episode I: Battle for Naboo]]'' (Writer) (2001)
*[[Star Wars: Starfighter (video game)|''Star Wars: Starfighter'']] (Writer) (2001)
*''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter]]'' (Writer) (2002)
*''[[Star Wars: Jedi Starfighter]]'' (Writer) (2002)
*''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'' (2003)
*''[[Star Wars: The Force Unleashed]]'' (Project Lead, Director, Writer) (2008)
*''[[Star Wars: The Force Unleashed II]]'' (Writer) (2010)
*''[[Star Wars: The Force Unleashed III]]'' (Writer) (Canceled)
